name: Jubilee Industries Holdings Ltd.
summary: Jubilee Industries Holdings Ltd., an investment holding company, manufactures and deals in precision plastic and metal molds. The company operates through two segments, Mechanical Business Unit and Electronics Business Unit. The Mechanical Business Unit segment offers plastic injection molds for consumer electronics, household appliances, medical supplies, automotive, and computer peripherals; and precision plastic injection mold design and fabrication services. This segment provides single-shot, double-shot, vertical, insert, and gas-assisted molding services; and value-added services for plastic decorative purposes, such as laser etching, ultrasonic welding, heat staking, printing, polishing, and sub-assembly services. It also builds engineering tools for customers in the medical and automotive industry. The Electronics Business Unit segment distributes memory devices, radio frequency modules, power management integrated circuits, microcontrollers, transistors, MOSFETs, capacitors, inductors, resistors, crystal oscillators, and connectors, as well as provides industrial power solutions, and design-in and integration services. This segment serves original design manufacturers, original equipment manufacturers, and electronics manufacturers. It has operations in Singapore, the United States, Malaysia, the People's Republic of China, India, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, and other countries. The company was formerly known as JLJ Holdings Limited and changed its name to Jubilee Industries Holdings Ltd. in April 2012. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Singapore. Jubilee Industries Holdings Ltd. is a subsidiary of Accrelist Ltd.
